image:image.image:title: Painel informativo do Svalbard Global Seed Vault
image:image.image:caption: Painel informativo do Svalbard Global Seed Vault em Longyearbyen, com a entrada do cofre e as montanhas ao fundo.

image:image.image:title: Helem Franceschini at the Svalbard Global Seed Vault
image:image.image:caption: Helem Franceschini at the entrance of the Svalbard Global Seed Vault, in Longyearbyen — Norway.

image:image.image:title: Do Pingo Borrachinha ao Prompt Injection — Os Limites Éticos da Defesa do Cliente
image:image.image:caption: Imagem ilustrativa do artigo sobre ética profissional, prompt injection em petições e o paralelo com o caso Sahione (2003).

image:image.image:title: From Pingo Borrachinha to Prompt Injection — The Ethical Limits of Client Defense
image:image.image:caption: Illustrative image for the article on legal ethics, prompt injection in court filings and the parallel with the 2003 Sahione case.
